seo.description: Free password generator tool. Create strong, secure passwords and memorable passphrases. Client-side generation for maximum security.

password-gen.subtitle: Generate secure passwords and memorable passphrases. All processing happens in your browser.

strength.title: Strength
strength.description: Entropy measures the randomness of the password. More bits = more secure.

security.title: 100% Private & Secure
security.description: All passwords are generated locally in your browser using the Web Crypto API. Nothing is sent to any server.

jwt-decoder.title: JWT Decoder

seo.description: Free JWT decoder tool. Decode JSON Web Tokens to view header, payload claims, and verify signature. Check token expiration instantly.

jwt-decoder.subtitle: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens. View header, payload claims, and verify token validity.
jwt-decoder.inputDescription: Paste your JWT token here to decode
jwt-decoder.invalidToken: Invalid JWT format. Token must have 3 parts separated by dots.
jwt-decoder.signatureDescription: The signature is used to verify the token's integrity and authenticity.
jwt-decoder.signatureNote: Note: This tool decodes tokens client-side. Signature verification requires the secret key, which should never be exposed in client-side code.
jwt-decoder.enterTokenHint: Enter a JWT token on the left to see the decoded output

css-minifier.description: Minify CSS for production or beautify for development.
css-minifier.subtitle: Minify CSS for production or beautify for development.

color-palette.title: Color Palette Generator
color-palette.description: Create harmonious color palettes for your designs. Generate monochromatic, analogous, and complementary combinations.
color-palette.subtitle: Create harmonious color palettes for your designs. Generate monochromatic, analogous, and complementary combinations.
color-palette.sampleText: This is sample text to show how colors look in different interface contexts.

algorithmDescriptions.complementary: Uses opposite colors on the color wheel to create maximum contrast.
algorithmDescriptions.triadic: Three equidistant colors on the color wheel for vibrant harmony.
algorithmDescriptions.tetradic: Four colors in complementary pairs for rich variety.
algorithmDescriptions.analogous: Adjacent colors on the color wheel for smooth harmony.
algorithmDescriptions.monochromatic: Variations of a single color through different saturations and lightness.
algorithmDescriptions.splitComplementary: One base color with two colors adjacent to its complement.

fileCarver.title: File Carver
fileCarver.dropMessage: Drag & Drop a corrupted file here
fileCarver.supportMessage: Supports RAW dumps, corrupted ZIPs, missing headers, etc.
fileCarver.noResults: No recognizable magic bytes found in this file.
fileCarver.feature1: No files are uploaded. Processing happens entirely in your local browser memory.
fileCarver.feature2: Detects JPEG, PNG, GIF, PDF, ZIP, MP3 and WAV signatures.
fileCarver.feature3: Ideal for cybersecurity, forensics and recovering sensitive dropped data.

image-steganography.subtitle: Hide text or full files inside PNG/JPG images without uploading anything. 100% in your browser.
image-steganography.description: Free steganography tool to hide messages or files in photos using LSB technique. Ideal for security and privacy testing.
image-steganography.privacy: All processing happens locally in your browser. Images and messages are never sent to any server.
image-steganography.coverHint: Recommended max size 4K. The larger the image, the more data you can hide.
image-steganography.payloadTextPlaceholder: Write the secret message you want to hide inside the image...
image-steganography.payloadDrop: Drag here the file you want to hide
image-steganography.payloadHint: The file is embedded byte by byte into the pixels. Only the steganographic image is stored on your device.
image-steganography.tooLarge: The file is too large. Approximate maximum: {max} bytes.
image-steganography.stegoDrop: Drag here the image that contains hidden data
image-steganography.stegoHint: It must be an image previously generated with this or another compatible steganography tool.
image-steganography.extractedTextPlaceholder: The hidden message will appear here if the image contains embedded text...

success.embed: Data successfully hidden inside the image.
success.extract: Data successfully extracted from the image.

errors.loadImage: Could not load image. Try another file.
errors.noPayloadText: Write some text to hide in the image.
errors.noPayloadFile: Select a file to hide in the image.
errors.notEnoughCapacity: The image does not have enough capacity to store all the data. Try a larger image or less data.
errors.encode: An error occurred while embedding the data into the image.
errors.noStego: Select an image that contains hidden data.
errors.decode: Could not extract valid data from the image.

image-steganography.localOnly: 100% local processing. Nothing is uploaded to external servers.
image-steganography.disclaimer: This tool is intended for educational and security testing purposes. Do not use it for illegal activities or to violate others' privacy.

sshKeyGen.subtitle: Generate RSA, Ed25519 and ECDSA SSH key pairs with fingerprints directly in your browser. 100% private.
sshKeyGen.title: Generate secure SSH key pairs
sshKeyGen.description: Free SSH key generator to create modern key pairs for servers and Git. All keys are generated client-side using Web Crypto API.
sshKeyGen.privacy: Keys are never sent to any server. Everything is generated and kept locally in your browser.
sshKeyGen.bitsHint: Use 4096 bits for maximum compatibility and security. Higher values increase generation time.
sshKeyGen.passphrasePlaceholder: Optional passphrase to encrypt your private key...
sshKeyGen.passphraseHint: For production use, always protect your private key with a strong passphrase.
sshKeyGen.publicKeyPlaceholder: The OpenSSH public key will appear here...
sshKeyGen.privateKeyPlaceholder: The PEM-encoded private key will appear here. Keep it secret.
sshKeyGen.localOnly: 100% local generation. Keys never leave your browser.

sslCertGen.subtitle: Generate private key, CSR and self-signed SSL certificate for testing directly in your browser.
sslCertGen.title: Generate SSL certificates and CSRs
sslCertGen.description: Free browser-based tool to create self-signed certificates and CSRs. Ideal for local development, staging and labs.
sslCertGen.privacy: Keys and certificates are generated locally in your browser and never sent to any server.
sslCertGen.validYearsHint: Set how many years the certificate should be valid for (1–10). For production, follow CA best practices.
sslCertGen.csrPlaceholder: Generated CSR in PEM format will appear here...
sslCertGen.certPlaceholder: Generated certificate in PEM format will appear here...
sslCertGen.keyPlaceholder: Generated private key in PEM format will appear here...

errors.missingRequired: CN and country (C) are required fields.

sslCertGen.localOnly: 100% local generation. Keys and CSR never leave your browser.

fileEntropy.subtitle: Upload a file and measure its Shannon entropy, randomness percentage and probable nature (plain, compressed, encrypted).
fileEntropy.title: Analyze file entropy and randomness
fileEntropy.description: Free browser-based tool to estimate whether a file is likely plaintext, compressed or encrypted based on its entropy.
fileEntropy.privacy: Files are processed locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
fileEntropy.dropHere: Drag and drop a file here
fileEntropy.dropHint: We only read the bytes client-side to compute entropy. No data is stored.
fileEntropy.noData: Upload a file and run the analysis to see its entropy profile.

errors.read: Could not read the selected file.

fileEntropy.localOnly: 100% local analysis. No file content leaves your device.

advHash.subtitle: Generate SHA-256, SHA-512 and PBKDF2 hashes with configurable parameters directly in your browser.
advHash.title: Generate advanced cryptographic hashes
advHash.description: Free hashing tool to derive strong digests and PBKDF2 keys for security testing and password storage prototypes.
advHash.privacy: All hashing is performed locally with Web Crypto API. Inputs are never sent to a server.
advHash.inputPlaceholder: Write the text or secret you want to hash...
advHash.saltPlaceholder: Enter a random salt, e.g. base64 or hex...
advHash.iterationsHint: Higher iterations increase security but also CPU time. Use realistic values for your environment.
advHash.lengthHint: Typical PBKDF2 key sizes are 32 bytes (256 bits) or 64 bytes (512 bits).
advHash.outputPlaceholder: The generated hash will appear here...

errors.noInput: Enter some input text to hash.
errors.noSalt: Provide a salt to derive PBKDF2.

advHash.localOnly: 100% local hashing. No secrets leave your browser.

footer.description: Free development and productivity tools. Client-side processing for maximum privacy.
